failing_pipelines.issue: Invalid Go version format in go.mod
failing_pipelines.fix_description: Changed go.mod version directive from '1.24.0' to '1.24'. Go version format must be MAJOR.MINOR not MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH. This was causing golangci-lint to fail.
failing_pipelines.verification: Iteration 25 confirmed pipeline succeeded - log shows 'Pipeline finished (main)' with status 'succeeded'
failing_pipelines.errors_fixed: golangci-lint: invalid go version '1.24.0': must match format 1.23

failing_pipelines.issue: Dependabot PR blocked by Telegram secret restrictions
failing_pipelines.fix_description: GitHub security feature: Dependabot PRs don't receive all secrets. Pipeline fails at 'Pipeline start' step due to missing TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN/TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID. This is expected and cannot be auto-merged.
failing_pipelines.note: Owner manual review required to merge dependabot PRs
